clips.title: The Bloodstream
clips.prompt: Cinematic VFX medical journey, one continuous impossible push-in. Begins on a person's arm, then the camera plunges impossibly through the skin and travels inside the body, flowing through a glowing red blood vessel among floating red blood cells in a single seamless move. A person, arm in frame. Seamless into-the-body transition, microscopic bloodstream, luminous, 24fps.

clips.title: The Heart
clips.prompt: Cinematic VFX medical journey, one continuous impossible push-in. Starts on a person's chest, then the camera dives impossibly through the skin and into the body, entering the chambers of a beating heart, walls pulsing around it, in a single seamless move. A person, chest in frame. Seamless into-the-body transition, beating heart interior, luminous, 24fps.
